sidebar.noChatsYet: No chats yet. Start one to begin.

chat.welcomeDescription: Pick an existing thread or send your first message to start a fresh chat with a clean sandbox.
chat.aiDisclaimer: AI can make mistakes. Consider verifying important information.
chat.chatNotFoundDescription: The chat you're looking for doesn't exist.
chat.toolsDescription: These apply to the next message.
chat.landingToolsDescription: These apply to the first message.
chat.skipApprovalPrompts: Skip approval prompts for tool executions in this thread.
chat.retryDescription: This will remove all messages after the selected one and retry with the same message using {{model}}. Continue?

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Model, search, and UI preferences for this workspace.
settings.showStatsDescription: Display tokens/sec and context size above input
settings.mcpServerDescription: MCP server integration will be available in a future update.

personality.manageDescription: Create, edit, and delete custom AI personalities.
personality.noCustomPersonalitiesDescription: Create your first custom personality to personalize your AI assistant.
personality.builtInDescription: The following personalities are built-in and cannot be edited or deleted:
personality.createPersonalityDescription: Create a new AI personality for your chat.
personality.name: Name
personality.systemPromptDescription: This prompt defines how the AI should behave. Use {tone} to insert the selected communication style.
personality.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this personality?

memory.title: Memory Manager
memory.description: Manage what the assistant remembers about you.
memory.addPlaceholder: Add a new fact or preference...
memory.noMemories: No memories found. The assistant will add things here as you chat.
memory.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this memory?
